reasoning: The control requires multi-factor authentication (MFA) for all users, which can be mapped to Kubernetes by ensuring that authentication mechanisms support MFA. This can be achieved by configuring Kubernetes to use an external identity provider (IdP) that enforces MFA, typically through OIDC. Additionally, ensuring that the API server is configured to authenticate users via this IdP would be necessary.
title: Require multi-factor authentication (MFA) for all users
